title: Upload multi-frame sequence with stable PicID
description:
Feature: Upload multi-frame sequence with stable PicID
Scenario: HttpGif upload uses one PicID and ordered offsets
Given a native GifSequence with multiple frames
When upload_sequence is called in frame_by_frame mode
Then all Draw/SendHttpGif commands use the same PicID, PicNum, and PicOffset 0..N-1)

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented and verified stable PicID multi-frame upload behavior with ordered offsets and shared PicNum/PicSpeed.
